summary.conclusion: Keep AADB practical A-LAMP as the app-facing model; keep MPNet as paper-oriented research baseline.
summary.mpnet_status: Research Baseline, Binary Classification, Accuracy ~0.67 on AVA.
summary.key_decision: The tracks serve different purposes. AADB A-LAMP is critical for the current A-cut product ranking, while MPNet provides a baseline for the A-LAMP paper reproduction track.
